section_title: Three things you don't have to worry about.

tiles.detail: Claude Code + senior product instincts = 5× the throughput of a typical agency. First working slice in week one.

tiles.objection: Do I get a sales rep, a PM, and a junior dev?
tiles.answer: You get one senior operator on every call.
tiles.detail: 15 years of product. The same operator writes the prompts, codes the system, deploys it, and watches the metrics. No relay race.

tiles.objection: What if I want to fire you?
tiles.answer: All code, all credentials — yours. Day one.
tiles.detail: Repo in your GitHub. Keys in your accounts. Walk away whenever. We work to be re-hired, not to be locked in.
